Product Range

Four disciplines. One standard of precision.

Every category is engineered to the same tolerance — whether it furnishes a boardroom, a bedroom, a classroom or a factory floor.

Why Choose SAMT

Factory-direct. Precision-checked.

Every order runs through the same eight-point standard, whether it's a single executive desk or a thousand-seat institutional rollout.

01

Custom Dimensions

Every piece is engineered to your architectural drawings — not the other way around. No standard-size compromises.

02

Factory Direct

No middlemen. Direct pricing and direct accountability from our own manufacturing facility.

03

Bulk Orders

Built for institutional-scale rollouts across campuses, hospitals and government projects.

04

Quality Assurance

Multi-stage inspection at material, manufacturing and finishing checkpoints.

05

Installation Support

Our own teams handle site installation — not a subcontractor.

06

PAN India Delivery

Logistics network covering every major metro and Tier-2 city.

07

Warranty

Structural and finish warranty backed by our own service network.

Manufacturing Process

From drawing to delivery.

A fixed five-stage process — the same sequence for every order, regardless of size.

01

Design

We translate your architectural drawings and requirements into detailed manufacturing specifications.

02

Material Selection

Grade-checked timber, steel and hardware sourced against our own material standard.

03

Manufacturing

Precision cutting, welding and assembly on our own factory floor.

04

Quality Check

Every unit is inspected against dimensional and finish tolerance before dispatch.

05

Installation

Our own installation teams complete on-site fit-out and final handover.

FAQ

Common questions.

We manufacture for single-piece executive orders as well as bulk institutional rollouts of thousands of units. There is no minimum order.

Yes — every product line can be engineered to your architect's drawings, including non-standard sizes and finishes.

Standard executive and office ranges ship in 15–20 working days. Bulk institutional orders are scheduled on a project timeline agreed at contract stage.

Yes. Our logistics network covers every major metro and Tier-2 city, with our own installation teams on site.

All products carry structural and finish warranty, backed by our own service network — not a third-party vendor.
